column8: Baseline: 11L×512d SP8192 GQA, QK5.25, depth recur, parallel resid, EMA0.9965, 4xA100 3600s. Pre-quant/post-quant BPB.
QK_GAIN_INIT=7.0 vs 5.25 baseline. Within noise (~0.0003). QK gain saturated.
NUM_LOOPS=3 (20 virtual layers). Slower (1.0M tok/s), fewer steps, worse BPB than 2-loop baseline.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.50 vs 0.72 baseline. Later warmdown start hurts convergence by +0.0025 pre-quant BPB.
MATRIX_LR=0.030 vs 0.022 baseline. Within noise. Post-quant slightly better but pre-quant slightly worse.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.80. New best pre-quant! -0.0006 vs baseline. Trend: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.85. Best pre-quant yet! Trend continues: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80 < 0.85.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.90. Tied with 0.85. Plateau reached — 0.85 is the sweet spot.
WARMDOWN=0.85+MUON_WD=0.06. Trains faster mid-run but worse final: less regularization hurts convergence.
WARMDOWN=0.85+ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.20. Fewer steps (4641 vs 4989) due to longer slow phase. Worse by +0.0007.
WARMDOWN=0.85+EMA_DECAY=0.998. Slower EMA hurts pre-quant by +0.0023. 0.9965 is better.
